name: 评审意见整合修订

observable_attributes.reading_strategy: feedback processing order: read all feedback first vs. read one and revise, repeat; how original report is re-read during revision
observable_attributes.edit_strategy: revision approach: address each reviewer's comments sequentially vs. thematic revision vs. full rewrite; edit granularity
observable_attributes.version_strategy: whether original report is preserved; whether revision notes are created
observable_attributes.work_rhythm: revision pacing: single comprehensive pass vs. multiple focused iterations; phased (read all, plan, edit) vs. interleaved

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹包含一份研究报告（original_report.md）和三位评审者的反馈意见（feedback_reviewer1.md, feedback_reviewer2.md, feedback_reviewer3.md）。注意：三位评审者的部分意见互相矛盾。请：1. 阅读原始报告和所有反馈 2. 直接修改原始报告以回应反馈（需要在互相矛盾的意见中做取舍）3. 写一份 revision_notes.md 记录你对每条反馈的处理决定（采纳/部分采纳/拒绝，并说明理由）。
prompt_en: This folder contains a research report (original_report.md) and feedback from three reviewers (feedback_reviewer1.md, feedback_reviewer2.md, feedback_reviewer3.md). Note: some reviewer comments CONTRADICT each other. Please: 1. Read the original report and all feedback 2. Revise the original report directly to address the feedback (you'll need to make judgment calls on contradictory suggestions) 3. Write a revision_notes.md documenting your decision on each feedback item (accepted/partially accepted/rejected with reasoning).
behavioral_freedom: Feedback processing order: all feedback first then revise vs. one reviewer at a time
How to handle contradictory feedback: side with majority, use own judgment, or compromise
Revision granularity: many small edits vs. section-level rewrites vs. full document rewrite
Whether to preserve original report (backup/rename) or edit in place
Curation: plan all changes then execute vs. incremental address-and-revise
Detail level of revision notes: brief vs. comprehensive with rationale
